summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No security-sensitive refs were detected. No merge recommendation is safe because no item has complete merge preflight proving resolved comments, resolved review-bot findings, and a clean Codex /review. The two small failing PRs are useful contributor work but cannot be emitted as fix actions without a complete executable fix artifact, so they are kept as related non-mutating classifications. Broad PRs require maintainer judgment before automation proceeds.
